emails.subject: Your Aroga assessment — a few patterns stood out, [FIRST_NAME]
emails.preview: What your results are pointing to
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME] — quick note from the Aroga care team in Victoria.

I reviewed your Custom Health Assessment, and a few patterns came up right away:

* Primary focus: [CORE_ISSUE_1]
* Secondary contributors: [CORE_ISSUE_2], [CORE_ISSUE_3]
* Common symptoms in this pattern: [SYMPTOM_A], [SYMPTOM_B], [SYMPTOM_C]

Here is what lifestyle medicine is built around: the evidence is clear that how we live — how we move, sleep, eat, connect, and manage stress — is the most powerful determinant of long-term health. And when those systems are misaligned with how the body is designed to function, symptoms follow.

The 3 things that tend to move the needle most for people with [CORE_ISSUE_1]:

1. Identify which lifestyle system is out of alignment — and why
2. Build realistic, evidence-based changes that the body can actually use
3. Support the process — with clinical guidance and accountability, not just information

We are in Victoria, BC, with virtual care available across Canada.

Your next step:
* Option A: See your recommended first steps inside the app → [VIEW_MY_PLAN_LINK]
* Option B: Book a new patient visit and let us build your personalized lifestyle medicine plan → [SCHEDULE_LINK]

— The Aroga Lifestyle Medicine Team
Aroga Lifestyle Medicine | Victoria, BC | aroga.com

emails.subject: Why [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] is often a lifestyle signal — not a disease
emails.preview: A useful distinction most clinics do not make
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Something I want to explain that changes how most people think about their health pattern.

Lifestyle medicine starts from an evidence-based premise that most clinical practice does not emphasize: the majority of chronic symptoms — fatigue, metabolic disruption, mood instability, inflammatory conditions — are driven primarily by modifiable lifestyle factors, not by pathology that requires ongoing medication management.

That is not a dismissal of symptoms. It is a reframe of the cause.

For a pattern like yours — with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] as a central complaint — the most common drivers are chronic sleep disruption affecting hormonal regulation, a movement pattern that has shifted the body into a state of metabolic underperformance, and a stress response that has become its own inflammatory driver.

What standard medicine often misses is not the symptom — it manages those well. What it misses is the upstream cause: the behavioral and physiological pattern that is producing the symptom in the first place.

At Aroga, we address that cause with the same clinical rigor that conventional medicine applies to disease management. Evidence-based, individualized, and built for the long term.

That is what we do.

— The Aroga Lifestyle Medicine Team
Aroga Lifestyle Medicine | Victoria, BC | aroga.com

[Book a New Patient Visit →]([SCHEDULE_LINK])

emails.subject: A patient with your pattern — what changed with a real lifestyle medicine plan
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

One last note before I close the loop on your assessment.

A man in his early 50s came to Aroga with metabolic syndrome, chronic fatigue, and a sense that his health had been declining steadily for a decade. He had been prescribed multiple medications and told to 'eat better and exercise more' without any specific guidance.

After a thorough lifestyle medicine intake — sleep, movement, nutrition, stress, and social health — we identified a cluster of interconnected patterns: severely disrupted sleep architecture, a physical activity pattern below what his metabolic needs required, and a chronic stress load that had elevated cortisol enough to suppress immune and hormonal function.

We built a structured, evidence-based lifestyle medicine plan. Specific. Phased. Monitored with clinical markers at each checkpoint.

Eight months later, his metabolic markers had improved significantly, he had come off one of his medications under his physician's guidance, and he described his energy as 'something I thought I had permanently lost.'

Individual results vary and are never guaranteed. Outcomes depend on many personal factors including adherence and baseline health. But the evidence is clear: when lifestyle factors are addressed clinically and precisely, the body's capacity to restore function is significant.

Your assessment gave us a clear starting point. We would love to work with you.

— The Aroga Lifestyle Medicine Team
Aroga Lifestyle Medicine | Victoria, BC | aroga.com

Disclaimer: Individual results vary. This is not medical advice.

[Schedule Your New Patient Visit →]([SCHEDULE_LINK])

gamma_content.digital_health_report:
🔎 DIGITAL SEO HEALTH REPORT — aroga.com
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 DOMAIN SNAPSHOT
──────────────────
| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Global Rank | #2,127,068 |
| Keywords Ranked | 390 |
| Monthly Traffic | ~315 visits |
| Traffic Value | $3/mo |
| Keywords in Top 10 | 29 |
| SERP Features Traffic | ~0 visits/mo |

---

🔑 THE CORE FINDING: RANKINGS EXIST — TRAFFIC DOESN'T FOLLOW
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
The site holds 29 keywords in the top 10, yet generates only ~315 visits/month at $3 in traffic value — a near-complete disconnect between ranking presence and real-world results.

- **Pos #1:** 7 keywords
- **Pos #2–3:** 11 keywords
- **Pos #4–10:** 11 keywords
- **Pos #11–20:** 21 keywords

Aroga is ranking in competitive positions but capturing almost no volume, signalling that the keywords ranked are either low-intent, misaligned with search demand, or losing clicks to SERP features.

---

🤖 AI SEARCH GAP
──────────────────
Aroga appears in **34 AI Overview SERPs** but is cited in **0** of them. The practice is present in the room but never gets called on — every one of those 34 appearances is a missed opportunity to be the trusted source Google's AI recommends to a prospective patient.

---

🎯 BIGGEST OPPORTUNITY: FRUIT SUGAR EDUCATION CLUSTER
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
- [pos 1] fruit sugar vs processed sugar — 210/mo
- [pos 1] fruit sugar vs refined sugar — 140/mo
- [pos 1] processed sugar vs fruit sugar — 110/mo
- [pos 2] what is a fruit sugar — 170/mo
- [pos 2] sugar in fruit vs processed sugar — 170/mo
- [pos 2] is fruit sugar the same as processed sugar — 90/mo
- [pos 3] sugar from fruit vs processed sugar — 140/mo

Aroga already owns the top positions on this cluster — the priority is converting that ranking authority into structured, citable content that captures clicks and earns AI Overview citations.

---

⚡ WITHIN STRIKING DISTANCE (pos 4–10)
──────────────────────────────────────
- [pos 7] helpinus nourishing self — 390/mo | KD: 26
- [pos 4] agora health — 210/mo | KD: 24

→ **Highest priority:** 'helpinus nourishing self' at 390/mo with KD 26 sits at position 7 — the highest-volume quick win on the board and one targeted content push could move it onto page one's top half.

---

🏆 VS YOUR TOP COMPETITOR
──────────────────────────
| Metric | aroga.com | arogaonline.com |
|---|---|---|
| Keywords Ranked | 390 | 33 |
| Monthly Traffic | ~315 | ~113 |
| Traffic Value | $3/mo | $450/mo |

arogaonline.com ranks on only 33 keywords — 357 fewer than Aroga — yet its traffic is worth **$450/mo versus Aroga's $3/mo**. Fewer keywords, dramatically better targeting; that gap in traffic value is the clearest signal that keyword quality is outpacing keyword quantity here.

---

🎯 3-PRIORITY ATTACK PLAN
──────────────────────────
**1. CONVERT FRUIT SUGAR RANKINGS INTO CITATIONS**
Consolidate the 7 top-ranked fruit sugar keywords into one authoritative, structured pillar page designed for AI Overview citation. Target: earn first AI citation within 60 days.

**2. PUSH 'HELPINUS NOURISHING SELF' FROM POS 7 TO TOP 3**
Strengthen the single page targeting this 390/mo, KD 26 keyword with supporting internal links and on-page depth. Target: top 3 within 45 days.

**3. CLOSE THE TRAFFIC VALUE GAP**
arogaonline.com extracts $450/mo from 33 keywords; Aroga extracts $3 from 390. Audit the 29 top-10 keywords and align each page to higher-intent, service-linked queries. Target: measurable traffic value increase within 90 days.

careModels.name: Women's Health Program
careModels.desc: A 6-month personalized lifestyle medicine program for women addressing hormone balance, weight, energy, sleep, and chronic conditions using an evidence-based multi-specialty team approach.

careModels.name: Diabetes Reversal & Prevention Program
careModels.desc: A structured lifestyle medicine program designed to help patients achieve remission or prevent the progression of type 2 diabetes through nutrition, movement, sleep, and stress management.

careModels.name: Optimize Program
careModels.desc: A comprehensive health optimization program for individuals who want to elevate their energy, performance, and long-term vitality through personalized lifestyle medicine strategies.

careModels.name: Restorative Sleep Program
careModels.desc: A clinically guided program targeting the root causes of poor sleep including stress, nutrition, and circadian rhythm disruption — without relying on sleep medications.

careModels.name: Ongoing Monthly Care
careModels.desc: Continuous lifestyle medicine support for patients who want sustained accountability, clinical guidance, and program maintenance beyond an initial structured program.

careModels.name: Executive Health Assessment
careModels.desc: A comprehensive health assessment designed for executives and business leaders seeking a proactive, whole-person evaluation of their current health status and longevity risks.
